# Load the file
path = "/mnt/data/file-GG2JJtkLwCXqgAvYETthYV-text_to_analyse.txt"
with open(path, "rb") as f:
    raw_bytes = f.read()
raw = raw_bytes.decode('utf-8', errors='strict')
len(raw), raw[:500]

spans = []
# define the texts exactly as in raw
texts = [
"وَآتِ ذَا الْقُرْبَى حَقَّهُ وَالْمِسْكِينَ وَابْنَ السَّبِيلِ وَلا تُبَذِّرْ تَبْذِيرًا * إِنَّ الْمُبَذِّرِينَ كَانُوا إِخْوَانَ الشَّيَاطِينِ وَكَانَ الشَّيْطَانُ لِرَبِّهِ كَفُوراً",
"يَا بَنِي آدَمَ خُذُوا زِينَتَكُمْ عِنْدَ كُلِّ مَسْجِدٍ وَكُلُوا وَاشْرَبُوا وَلا تُسْرِفُوا إِنَّهُ لا يُحِبُّ الْمُسْرِفِينَ",
"قُلْ مَنْ حَرَّمَ زِينَةَ اللَّهِ الَّتِي أَخْرَجَ لِعِبَادِهِ",
"كلوا واشربوا والبسوا وتصدقوا في غير إسراف ولا مخيلة"
]
for t in texts:
    i = raw.find(t)
    spans.append((t, i, i+len(t)))
spans

# Find all occurrences of those strings
def find_all(s, sub):
    i = 0
    res = []
    while True:
        j = s.find(sub, i)
        if j == -1:
            break
        res.append((j, j+len(sub)))
        i = j+1
    return res

for t in texts:
    occ = find_all(raw, t)
    print(t[:20], len(occ), occ)

# extract part of references [2] around the ayat
start = raw.find("[2]")
print(raw[start:start+800])

# Extract spans inside parentheses in the [2] section for the three citations
sec2 = raw[start:start+1600]
# find all parenthetical segments following "قال الله تعالى:" etc
import re
paren_contents = re.findall(r'قال الله تعالى:\s*\((.*?)\)', sec2)
paren_contents2 = re.findall(r'وقال تعالى:\s*\((.*?)\)', sec2)
paren_contents3 = re.findall(r'قول الله تعالى:\s*\((.*?)\)', sec2)
paren_contents, paren_contents2, paren_contents3

to_find = paren_contents + paren_contents2 + paren_contents3
positions = []
for sstr in to_find:
    idx = raw.find(sstr)
    positions.append((sstr, idx, idx+len(sstr)))
positions

# Search for the fragment
frag = "وَلَا تُبَذِّرْ تَبْذِيرًا"
idx = raw.find(frag)
idx, raw[idx-30:idx+len(frag)+30]
